sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10317" key="a)ntipeistiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιπειστικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n10317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">availing to persuade to the contrary, An.Bachm.</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.291</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
